questions.question: Which of the following is a key characteristic of the chalk and talk method?
options: The use of visual aids to engage students
The instructor writes on the board
The instructor uses PowerPoint presentation
The instructor does not use any visual aids
questions.explanation: The chalk and talk method involves the instructor using visual aids such as slides or handouts to support their lecture.

questions.question: What is a common drawback of the chalk and talk method when it comes to learner engagement?
options: Learners are more likely to get distracted by their phones
Learners are more likely to get engaged by interactive activities
Learners are less likely to get engaged by visual aids
Learners are more likely to get engaged by group discussions
questions.explanation: One common drawback of the chalk and talk method is that it can be less engaging for learners, especially when it involves a lot of lecturing without interactive activities.

questions.question: When using PowerPoint presentations, what is the main advantage for the instructor?
options: It allows for more hands-on activities
It allows for more interactive discussions
It enables the instructor to present complex information more clearly
It allows for more free time for the instructor
questions.explanation: One main advantage of using PowerPoint presentations is that they enable instructors to present complex information more clearly and concisely.

questions.question: What is a common criticism of the chalk and talk method when it comes to learner assessment?
options: Learners are more likely to be assessed based on their participation
Learners are less likely to be assessed based on their performance on presentations
Learners are more likely to be assessed based on their written assignments
Learners are less likely to be assessed based on their quizzes
questions.explanation: One common criticism of the chalk and talk method is that it can be less effective in assessing learners' understanding, especially when it comes to presentations and group work.

questions.question: Which of the following is a way to improve the learner engagement using the chalk and talk method?
options: Using more interactive activities like group discussions
Using more hands-on activities like simulations
Using more visual aids like videos and images
Using more free time for the instructor
questions.explanation: One way to improve learner engagement using the chalk and talk method is to incorporate more interactive activities, such as group discussions and simulations.
